info.description: Flashcards help you learn more vocabulary anytime, anywhere.
info.title: Word Flashcard API

get.description: Get dictionary definition and pronunciation for a given word from Cambridge Dictionary API

404.description: Not found - Word not found in the dictionary

get.description: Returns server status to verify the service is running
Returns application version read from the root VERSION file

500.description: Internal server error - VERSION file not found or unreadable

get.description: Get all notes, supports pagination and multi-column sorting through query parameters

parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return (default: 100, max: 1000)
parameters.name: limit

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to fetch data from database

post.description: Create a new note card entry

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to insert data into database

get.description: Get the total count of notes in the database

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to count notes in database

post.description: Search for notes using specified filter criteria. Supports equal, not equal, in, not in, like and other operations with pagination.

parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return (default: 100, max: 1000)
parameters.name: limit

200.description: Notes found matching the search criteria

400.description: Bad request - Invalid request body, filter, or query parameters

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to fetch data from database

get.description: Get a specific note by its ID

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to fetch data from database

400.description: Bad request - Invalid note ID or request body

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to update data in database
Internal server error - Failed to delete data from database

get.description: Get all questions, supports pagination and multi-column sorting through query parameters

parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return (default: 100, max: 1000)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Sort columns/expressions, comma-separated. Format: col,-col,(expr),-(expr). Allowed: id,question,answer,count_practise,count_failure_practise,created_at,updated_at
parameters.name: sort

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to fetch data from database
Internal server error - Failed to insert data into database

get.description: Get the total count of questions in the database

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to count questions in database
Internal server error - Failed to delete data from database

post.description: Randomly obtain the required number of questions

parameters.description: Random filter criteria including count and optional filter
parameters.name: randomFilter

400.description: Bad request - Invalid request body or count parameter

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to fetch data from database

get.description: Get question count distribution by accuracy rate in 10% intervals

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to fetch questions

get.description: Get the question by its ID

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to fetch data from database

put.description: Update an existing question's properties like familiarity level

400.description: Bad request - Invalid question ID or request body

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to update data in database
Internal server error - Failed to delete data from database

get.description: Get all words with their definitions and pronunciation information, supports pagination through query parameters

parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return (default: 100, max: 1000)
parameters.name: limit

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to fetch data from database

post.description: Create a new word entry in the dictionary

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to insert data into database

post.description: Count the number of words that match the specified filter criteria across both words and word_definitions tables

200.description: Count of words matching the filter criteria

400.description: Bad request - Invalid request body or filter

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to fetch data from database

put.description: Update an existing word definition's content

400.description: Bad request - Invalid definition ID or request body

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to update data in database

post.description: Add a new definition to an existing word

400.description: Bad request - Invalid word ID or request body

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to insert data into database
Internal server error - Failed to delete data from database

post.description: Get random words using specified filter criteria

parameters.description: Random filter criteria including count and optional filter
parameters.name: randomFilter

400.description: Bad request - Invalid request body or count parameter

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to fetch data from database

post.description: Search for words using specified filter criteria across both words and word_definitions tables. Supports equal, not equal, in, and not in operations with pagination.

parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return (default: 100, max: 1000)
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Sort columns, comma-separated. Format: col,-col. Allowed: id,word,familiarity,count_practise,created_at
parameters.name: sort

200.description: Words found matching the search criteria

400.description: Bad request - Invalid request body, filter, or query parameters

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to fetch data from database

get.description: Get word count distribution by familiarity level and practice count

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to count words

put.description: Update an existing word's properties like familiarity level

400.description: Bad request - Invalid word ID or request body

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to update data in database

delete.description: Delete a word and all its associated definitions

500.description: Internal server error - Failed to delete data from database
